# acp.session.stop

Stop an active ACP session.

## Metadata

- **Type**: operation (command)
- **Version**: 1.0.0
- **Tags**: session

## Goal

Terminate ACP sessions cleanly with audit trails.

## Context

Used by ACP clients to stop sessions explicitly.
